evals.expected_output: Use the wildcard-checker skill for this wildcard checker request and produce the documented result for *.example.com.
expectations: Selects wildcard-checker for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_check_wildcard, cert_get_trusted_domains.
Keeps the response focused on analyzing wildcard certificate patterns and assessing security risk.

evals.prompt: Handle a focused wildcard checker workflow for *.example.com; do not switch to a broader certificate audit unless it is required.
evals.expected_output: Use the wildcard-checker skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects wildcard-checker instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
